Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Isn't it interesting how the sunlight on a winter's day seems clearer than it is during the summer?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Maybe it's because the sun is lower in the sky, and you don't have to look up to see it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I've gotten so used to this view... But no two times is it ever exactly the same.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You could say the same thing about one's day to day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}The Promised Day is almost here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 13 22 15 7}Whenever I come up here, I get lost in my thoughts.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}"I can't let it end like this..." "I want to protect it all." Thoughts like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Since last time... I've tried thinking things through more rationally.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I thought about that old lady and Mii-chan-san... and Kiyoshi-san as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I wonder if Mii-chan-san was alone until the moment of her death...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Somewhere no one could find her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I think... the old lady wanted to be there for her at the end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}To live means to be connected to other people, but life is finite. Farewells are unavoidable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}It's sad to think about, but you and I will have to part one day as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}And then... I'll never be able to see you again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}There are so many things in life I don't understand... It's filled with so much pain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}You meet others, forge relationships, and spend time with them... and then they're gone, leaving you behind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}No matter how human my heart becomes, my body will never be flesh and blood.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}As long as I undergo maintenance and can replace my broken parts, I will exist indefinitely.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}...But even so, I can understand this much.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}No two views are alike. No two days are the same.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}It's natural for everything to disappear, reemerge, and constantly change.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}That's what makes it so invaluable, and why one feels that it must be cherished...[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}When you think about it, it's a miracle that two given people are able to ever meet in this chaotic flow of time and space...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}That's why we find happiness in forging bonds and relationships.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I think that might be the true joy of being alive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}It can be sad, but at the same time so warm... Beautiful because it is destined to end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}And that's why... I mustn't hesitate any longer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}I have to tell you my feelings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I want to spend time with you, {f 4 2}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}To see new sights with you... To go to new places together.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}To share new experiences... To make far more memories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Your time is finite, and I know that someone like me shouldn't be taking it away from you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But, even so... my wish is to be your closest friend.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I thought telling you how I felt would be enough for me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}But... hearing you say that makes me so happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}I was so afraid of being nothing but a burden to you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}I'll never forget the time we spent here today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}We should start heading back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}I wouldn't want my best friend to catch a cold from staying out too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm with Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
